svg.title: Medallion Architecture — Bronze, Silver, and Gold layers
svg.desc: Bronze holds raw Parquet files, Silver holds windowed aggregations, Gold holds three analyst-ready tables with the momentum_signal composite output

g.text: Time-stamped Parquet · ingested_at cursor · PyArrow schema enforcement at write
Late-arrival tolerance: 60s past window end · dbt incremental merge
silver_btc_aggregates — 1-min windowed avg price + total volume per (window_start, symbol)
Incremental merge · 5-min lookback · all signals computed in SQL · tested every run
